name: Garlic Olives
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the olives, garlic, lemon slices, peppercorns, bay leaves, and thyme in a jar.
2. Add sherry or vinegar (if using) and olive oil to cover all ingredients.
3. Secure the lid tightly on the jar.
4. Marinate for at least 24 hours, preferably overnight, to allow flavors to meld together.
Makes 2 cups
